summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Context namespace refactor (Issue #9). All namespaced action objects (tournamentActions, gameActions, assignmentActions, messageActions, availabilityActions, reportActions, notificationActions, paymentActions, connectionActions, settingsActions, independentGameActions) verified working in DataContext.jsx and all 20 consumer files. Manager and Referee flows tested end-to-end with Firebase auth.

ui_bugs.issue: Toggle buttons lack role='switch' and aria-checked attributes — not detectable by role-based selectors; accessibility concern

action_items: MINOR: Add role='switch' and aria-checked attributes to custom toggle buttons in Settings/NotificationsSettings.jsx for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: DataContext.jsx lines 206-241: Namespace grouping is correctly implemented. All 11 namespace objects (notificationActions, paymentActions, connectionActions, settingsActions, independentGameActions, tournamentActions, gameActions, assignmentActions+spread, messageActions, availabilityActions, reportActions+spread) are correctly defined and exposed in context value.
Consumer files: All 20 consumer files correctly destructure the namespaced objects from useData(). No missed function references found.
assignmentActions and reportActions use inline spread ({...hook, extraFunc}) pattern which is correct but could be pre-composed in the hook for clarity.
Firebase AbortError logged on page navigation (Firestore listener cleanup) - benign, not an app error.
test_credentials: Manager: manager@demo.com / manager123 | Referee: referee@demo.com / Referee123
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is a pure React + Firebase Vite app at /app (no FastAPI backend). DataContext namespace refactor verified complete and working. All 17 features from test plan pass. Manager: Tournaments(2 rows), Assignments(5 games), Availability(3 referees), Leaderboard(3 rows), Roster(3 referees), Reports(1 row). Referee: Schedule(My+Open tabs), Calendar(month view+Add Availability), Messages(6 inbox), Settings(7 toggles), Payments(1 payment), Games/IndependentLog(dialog works), FindManagers(1 current roster+pending). Notification panel shows 4 notifications with mark-all-read button. The only minor issue is Settings toggles lacking ARIA attributes.

test_results.manager_dashboard: PASS - loads at /manager with correct role
test_results.manager_assignments_tab: PASS - 5 games, 4 assign buttons + 4 complete buttons, assign dialog works via assignmentActions.assignRefereeToGame
test_results.manager_availability_tab: PASS - calendar with 3 referee rows, cert filter + week nav present
test_results.manager_leaderboard_tab: PASS - 3 referees, sort dropdown, assign button opens dialog via assignmentActions
test_results.manager_roster_tab: PASS - 3 referees with contact info, incoming requests section present via connectionActions
test_results.manager_reports_tab: PASS - 1 report row loaded via reportActions.addReportResolution
test_results.notification_panel: PASS - 4 notifications, unread badge, mark all read button (notificationActions)
test_results.referee_schedule_open: PASS - Open Games tab works (0 request buttons - all games assigned)
test_results.referee_calendar: PASS - month calendar loads, Add Availability dialog opens via availabilityActions.addAvailability
test_results.referee_messages: PASS - 6 inbox messages, New Message + compose works via messageActions.sendMessage
test_results.referee_settings: PASS - page loads, 7 toggle buttons functional via settingsActions.saveNotificationPreferences
test_results.referee_payments: PASS - 1 payment row ($75 paid) via paymentActions
test_results.referee_games_independent: PASS - Independent Log tab, Log Game dialog opens via independentGameActions.addIndependentGame
test_results.referee_find_managers: PASS - My Rosters + Available Managers sections, 1 request button via connectionActions.requestManagerConnection
